mismatches: Docs imply DEF codes map to CARES Act entries, but live validation admits a broader set including digits (1-9) and multi-letter codes such as AAA, AAB, and QQQ.
Docs enumerate award_type_codes without '-1', yet the API accepts '-1' as a valid value.
gaps: Unclear whether shared filters like time_period, keywords, or agencies are supposed to affect this endpoint; probes showed no change in counts despite varied inputs.
Full authoritative list of DEF codes was inferred from error messaging only; additional values may exist beyond those revealed.
risks: Silent acceptance of unsupported filter keys can mislead clients into thinking filters were applied when counts remain unchanged.
Differences between 422 (missing) and 400 (invalid) errors require client handling of both validation styles.
Award type sentinel '-1' is undocumented; relying on docs alone could lead to unexpected zero results.
